name: Island Brew Coffeehouse
tagline: Hawaii-grown coffee in an open-air lanai setting right on the Ala Moana waterfront.
mustOrder: Hawaiian honey latte — local honey and Waialua coffee
cold brew on nitro — smooth and creamy
parking: Ala Moana Center parking garage, free for 4 hours
talkStory: This is the spot when you want good Hawaii-grown coffee without the Waikiki markup. They source from multiple Hawaiian farms and rotate seasonally. The outdoor lanai has views of Ala Moana Beach Park — grab a seat outside if the trade winds are blowing. Way less hectic than the food court upstairs.
